global_description: Large mammal with a massive, barrel-shaped body, thick gray skin, short legs, large head with wide mouth, small eyes and ears on top, and a short tail.
discriminative_attributes: Small eyes and ears on top

part_details.head: Large with wide mouth, small eyes and ears on top
part_details.body: Massive, barrel-shaped with thick gray skin

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail at rear
Eyes and ears on top of head
